svg.text: Same-chain DEX swaps via Uniswap V3 · Cross-chain bridges via LayerZero · Real-time pricing via Binance WS

g.text: Entry point — auto-detects same-chain vs cross-chain
• No protocol fee — user only pays Uniswap pool fee (0.05-1%)
• Auto-selects best fee tier via QuoterV2
• Native ETH auto-wrapped to WETH before swap
swapAndBridge(token, amount, destEid, recipient, minOut, options)
• LayerZero V2 OApp with nonce replay protection
• Bridge fee: ~0.001-0.01 ETH (paid to LZ relayers)
Cross-chain message delivery · Validator + Executor network · 2-5 min
Validates peer · Checks nonce · Transfers tokens to recipient wallet
If LayerZero message fails to deliver:
3. Locked tokens returned to user wallet ✓
